What We Build

Three Pillars Behind
Every Project We Ship

Each engagement is designed around your goals — not templates.

Interactive Websites

Animations, micro-interactions, and scroll effects that make every visit feel alive and intentional.

CMS Integration

Update your own content, images, and pages anytime — no developer required after launch.

Visual Storytelling

Design that communicates your brand's message clearly, confidently, and beautifully across all screens.

Live Demos

Real Projects.

Each project ships with a CMS so clients stay in full control after launch.

How We Work

A Clear, Proven Process
From First Call to Launch

01

Discovery

Understand your goals, audience, and what success looks like before a single line is written.

02

Design

Visual concepts that bring your brand to life — refined until every detail feels right.

03

Build

Coded with performance, accessibility, and CMS in mind from the very first commit.

04

Launch

Full handover with training so you're confident running it yourself from day one.

About Aabantu

We Don't Just Build
Websites. We Build
Digital Experiences
That Convert.

Rooted in Kampala, building for the world. Every project we touch is an opportunity to show that African creativity and world-class technology are not separate things — they are the same thing.

Kampala · Africa · Worldwide
100%CMS Included — every project, no exceptions
FastTurnaround without cutting corners on craft
1:1Client training so you're fully in control

Remarkable?
